case_title: ANTHONY CAVALLO VS. RABBIT PRODUCT DESIGN INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00) SERVED JUL-28-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAVIN, ADAM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CAVALLO, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT RABBIT PRODUCT DESIGN INC. TAVIN, ADAM AHSAN, ASIF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALLO, ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RABBIT PRODUCT DESIGN INC. TAVIN, ADAM AHSAN, ASIF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY CAVALLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS RABBIT PRODUCT DESIGN INC., ADAM TAVIN AND ASIF ASHAN ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
